name: @chbrain/khai-engine-dramatic-situations
description: khai engine content, the dramatic-situations domain: Polti's finite set of dramatic situations as plots -- a protagonist, an opposing force, and a contested stake.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Dramatic situations as plot: Georges Polti's claim that every dramatic collision is one of a bounded set of situations, each a protagonist and an opposing force driving toward a contested stake.

card.wire: Attaches at Plot. The anchor (plot_dramatic_situation.md) declares the situation as such: a bounded role-collision -- a protagonist, an opposing force, and a contested stake -- that a plot instantiates. The law makes every plot's Action legible as one of a finite set of shapes.
card.issue: The collision, read across a representative spread of Polti's 36. Six exemplar situations name their own role-set and stake: supplication (Persecutor, Supplicant, Power), revenge (Avenger, Criminal), pursuit (Fugitive, Punishment), rivalry (Superior Rival, Inferior Rival, Object), self-sacrifice (Hero, Faith), disaster (Vanquished Power, Victorious Enemy). The anchor is the irreducible shape; the remaining situations are compositions the production selects from Polti.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor, so the situation shape is read for every plot. The link: each plot expresses, under Action, which situation's role-collision it instantiates.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and a real situation is linked under a plot's Action. Whether the situation fits the plot's own stakes is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give the plot its situation under Action: which exemplar role-collision (or a composed one, selected from Polti's 36) the plot instantiates, and who fills each role.
